title: Poincianella eriostachys
intro: Poincianella eriostachys, also known as African fever tree, is a medicinal plant native to tropical regions of sub-Saharan Africa. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Poincianella eriostachys include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. In traditional herbal medicine, Poincianella eriostachys is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to reduce fever, alleviate joint pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
